inclusions: Edible products of animal origin, not elsewhere specified or included
Edible non-living insects (whole or in parts, fresh, chilled, frozen, dried, smoked, salted or in brine, as well as flours and meals of insects, fit for human consumption)

exclusions.condition: Non-living insects, unfit for human consumption
Products obtained from whey, containing by weight more than 95% lactose, expressed as anhydrous lactose calculated on the dry matter
Products obtained from milk by replacing one or more of its natural constituents (e.g., butyric fats) by another substance (e.g., oleic fats)
Albumins (including concentrates of two or more whey proteins, containing by weight more than 80% whey proteins, calculated on the dry matter)
Edible non-living insects otherwise prepared or preserved
